prompt: Create a luxurious square product photo of an open premium chocolate gift box themed around an original anime girl character named Nozomu. The box lid is a custom limited-edition package illustration: a soft, dreamy anime girl with long dark navy-black hair with pale pink highlights, large sparkling eyes, blush cheeks, and small pastel blue and pink flowers tucked in her hair, wearing a white ruffled off-shoulder dress. Behind her is a moonlit night city skyline in teal and navy, a large crescent moon, tiny stars, hanging celestial ornaments, delicate gold filigree corner borders, and scattered cherry blossoms. Include elegant package typography on the lid: Japanese-style title “のぞむ”, small romanization “NOZOMU”, script subtitle “Moonlit Dream”, and “CHOCOLATE COLLECTION”. Inside the box, show exactly 10 artisan chocolates arranged in a 2-by-5 grid in black paper cups with thin gold dividers: 1 glossy blue sphere with gold flakes, 1 cream rose-shaped chocolate, 1 faceted pale blue gem chocolate, 1 dark round chocolate with a gold crescent moon and starry top, 1 white flower chocolate with gold center, 1 pale blue-white sphere with gold speckles, 1 pink flower chocolate with gold center, 1 glossy purple heart chocolate with tiny stars, 1 faceted white crystal chocolate with gold accents, and 1 blue marbled sphere with gold swirls. In front of the box, place a small matching dark navy product card with the same “のぞむ / NOZOMU / Moonlit Dream / CHOCOLATE COLLECTION” branding and crescent motif. Surround the scene with satin fabric, a pale silver ribbon bow, crystal glassware, small flowers, warm fairy lights, and sparkling highlights. Use a high-end romantic confectionery advertisement style, shallow depth of field, soft cinematic lighting, pastel blue pink gold palette, glossy textures, intricate packaging details, elegant and magical atmosphere, ultra-detailed photorealistic product photography mixed with polished anime illustration. Keep all text legible and avoid extra logos or watermarks.
